title: IterationResultPayload
description: The verified outcome of one loop iteration, reported by QC to the Loop Controller with the Verifier's objective evidence.

passed.description: Whether the external stop_condition is satisfied, as verified by the Verifier through QC — never the worker's self-report.

verified_evidence.description: Objective evidence from the Verifier (test output, build status).

changes.description: What this iteration changed (recorded in the loop ledger).

failures.description: What failed this iteration, recorded so the next fresh context avoids dead ends.

progress_metric.description: Progress measure used by the Loop Controller's no-progress guardrail.
